name: chr21_21q22_3_BACE2_SD
description: 21q22.3 region around BACE2 (beta-secretase 2), a paralog of BACE1 (11q23.3). Local SD blocks 20-60 kb at 94-96% identity flank BACE2; trisomy-21 dosage of BACE2 modulates APP processing in Down syndrome brain.

architecture.internal_structure: Two flanking SD pairs (~25 kb, ~55 kb) around BACE2 at 94-96% identity; intergene paralog (BACE1) on chr11.

related_diseases: Type 2 diabetes (BACE2 in pancreatic beta cells)
